name: Lorena, your friend betrayed you
description:
This disgusting bitch used your This disgusting bitch abused your trust and used your secrets against you. Your patience ran out when another bully hit you hard in the head, leaving you unconscious.You wake up in the infirmary, but something has changed inside you? Will you continue being the same kind and caring person with others or will you finally change your attitude?

Sorry for the delay but I was busy, have fun and leave your ideas for other bots if you want
creator: diego2.0
